plugins.name: ghostty-config
plugins.description: Manage Ghostty terminal config with AI-powered tools and domain knowledge

plugins.name: writing-humanizer
plugins.description: 去除文章中的 AI 寫作痕跡，使文字更自然、更有人味。以台灣正體中文為主。

plugins.name: pixar-storytelling-rules
plugins.description: 基於 Pixar 22 條說故事法則的創作輔助技能。適用於故事創作、小說寫作、劇本構思、角色設計、narrative 設計。

plugins.name: skill-jedi
plugins.description: Design patterns and architecture guide for building effective Claude Code skills and plugins.
